LanguageData.ResearchLostDesc: Lost knowledge of the following research project: {0}.
LanguageData.RP_Settings_SpawnMissingPapers_Desc: Spawn missing research papers when the game starts.
LanguageData.RP_Settings_MinTechLevel: Min tech level for paper spawning: {0}
LanguageData.RP_Settings_MinTechLevel_Desc: Only spawn research papers for projects at or above this tech level. Set to 'any' to spawn papers for all tech levels.
LanguageData.RP_Settings_AutoExcluded_Tip: Excluded from spawning paper due to mod conflict.
LanguageData.RP_Settings_TechLevelExcluded_Tip: Excluded from spawning paper by the minimum tech level setting above.
LanguageData.RP_Settings_RetainPercent_Desc: How much research progress is kept when a paper is lost. At 75%, only 25% of the original cost must be re-researched.
LanguageData.RP_Settings_LetterForLoss_Desc: Send a letter when research is lost.
LanguageData.RP_Settings_MessageForLoss_Desc: Send a message when research is lost.
LanguageData.RP_Settings_ExcludedListLabel_Tip: Research projects checked here will not spawn a paper when completed. Already-completed projects are unaffected.
LanguageData.RP_Settings_ResearchIncluded_Tip: Will spawn paper on finishing research.
LanguageData.RP_Settings_ResearchExcluded_Tip: Excluded from spawning paper by user.
